name: Almond-Stuffed Pears
recipeIngredient: 6 medium pears, peeled, halved and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pears, cut side down, in an ungreased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking dish.
2. Combine the water and grape juice; pour over the pears.
3. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 45 minutes or until tender.
4. Turn the pears over.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the almonds, brown sugar, and almond extract; mix well.
6. Spoon the almond mixture into the pear cavities.
7. Bake, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Serve warm. Yield: 6 servings.
